The '''Doneers''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insect/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Doneer'so]], located in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. Their renown for building excellent [[Starship/Legends|starships]] gave them a reputation across the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] selected Doneer'so as its sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]], choosing clan-[[City/Legends|city]] [[Sotak'vik]] as its headquarters. While that pleased the [[Sotak city-clan]], it made the other clans jealous. Some of those rivals sympathized instead with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Doneers were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insect/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CC" />

==Society and culture==
Doneer social organization was clan-based, and individuals showed fierce loyalty to their clan. That produced rivalry between clan-[[City/Legends|cities]], creating animosity that often broke out into violent conflict.<ref name="CC" />

The Doneers were technologically adept. They were known as excellent [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and builders, gaining a reputation as the superior [[Starshipwright|shipwrights]] and [[Technician/Legends|mechanics]] of the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. Nevertheless, the Doneers were not particularly adept at designing new [[Starship/Legends|starships]] or undertaking original research. The Doneers were extremely hard-working and were both quick and meticulous.<ref name="CC" />

==History==
The Doneers evolved on [[Doneer'so]], a jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the Fakir sector of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region. Their society developed around clan-cities, a system that evoked a strong sense of loyalty; rivalry between clan-cities sometimes erupted into conflict and among the numerous cities on the planet were several [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]]-scarred ruins. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established Doneer'so as its [[Sector/Legends|sector]] capital and selected the city of [[Sotak'vik]] as its headquarters. The Empire protected it with [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and a [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear-dampening system]]. The city's selection greatly increased the stature and power of the [[Sotak city-clan]]. While that made the Sotaks loyal to the Empire, many other clans became jealous; the Empire ruthlessly suppressed any overt expression of such attitudes. Several other cities, including the main [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] of [[Tokks'vik]], were thus heavily pro-[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]<ref name="CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Doneers were created by [[Paul Murphy]] for the [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1988]].<ref name="SWCP" />
